zh.lifeSummary: 當John Hughes於1500年出生在英國英格蘭史洛普爾姆 文洛可時，他的父親Hugh ap Evan Lloyd25歲，母親Mary Ap Gruffydd18歲。他於1521年10月26日與Margaret Fletcher在英國英格蘭越可爾哈利法可聖 約翰 馮 巴普迪斯也斯 邱奇結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1543年4月在英國英格蘭韋斯特 越可爾哈利法可享年43歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭越可爾哈利法可聖 約翰 馮 巴普迪斯也斯 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Hughes于1500年出生在英国英格兰史洛普爾姆 文洛可时，他的父亲Hugh ap Evan Lloyd25岁，母亲Mary Ap Gruffydd18岁。他于1521年10月26日与Margaret Fletcher在英国英格兰越可爾哈利法可聖 約翰 馮 巴普迪斯也斯 邱奇结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1543年4月在英国英格兰韋斯特 越可爾哈利法可享年43岁，埋葬在英国英格兰越可爾哈利法可聖 約翰 馮 巴普迪斯也斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Hughes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Welsh: variant of Hugh with genitival or excrescent -s.
Irish and Scottish: adopted as an equivalent of Gaelic surnames based on the personal name Aodh ‘fire’, for example Ó hAodha, Mac Aodha; see McCoy and compare McHugh .

variants.name: Hugh
meanings: English, Welsh, and Scottish (of Norman origin): from the Old French personal name Hue, from ancient Germanic Hugo (ultimately derived from hugi- ‘mind, spirit’). This was a very popular name in England after the Norman Conquest, partly due to the reputation of Saint Hugh of Lincoln (1140–1200), who was born in Burgundy and who established the first Carthusian monastery in England.
Scottish and Irish: adopted as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic personal name Aodh, a derivative of a Gaelic word meaning ‘fire’. See Hughes .
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surnames 邱 and 丘, based on their Hakka pronunciation; see   Qiu   1 and 2.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When John Hughes was born in 1500, in Much Wenlock, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Hugh ap Evan Lloyd, was 25 and his mother, Mary Ap Gruffydd, was 18. He married Margaret Fletcher on 26 October 1521, in St John the Baptist's Church, Halifax, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died in April 1543, in Halifax, West Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 43, and was buried in St John the Baptist's Church, Halifax, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Hughes est né en 1500, à Much Wenlock, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Hugh ap Evan Lloyd, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Mary Ap Gruffydd, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Fletcher le 26 octobre 1521, à St John the Baptist's Church, Halifax, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en avril 1543, à Halifax, West Yorkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 43 ans, et a été enterré à St John the Baptist's Church, Halifax, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Hughes 1500 in Much Wenlock, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugh ap Evan Lloyd 25 und seine Mutter Mary Ap Gruffydd 18. Er hat am 26. Oktober 1521 in St John the Baptist's Church, Halifax, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Margaret Fletcher geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. ja.lifeSummary: John Hughesが1500年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアムチ ウエンロックで生まれた時，父Hugh ap Evan Lloydは25歳，母Mary Ap Gruffyddは18歳であった。1521年10月26日にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアハリファックススト ジョン ス バプティスト'ス チャーチでMargaret Fletcherと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1543年4月にイギリスイギリスウエスト ヨークシュアイアハリファックスで43歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアハリファックススト ジョン ス バプティスト'ス チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.Saint John the Baptist Church, Halifax,: 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 할이파스 스트 존 테 바프티스트'스 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: John Hughes(이)가 1500년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 무치 웬록에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugh ap Evan Lloyd(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Ap Gruffydd(은)는 18세였다. 그는 1521년 10월 26일 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 할이파스 스트 존 테 바프티스트'스 c후르치에서 Margaret Fletcher(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1543년 4월 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트 요르크실르 할이파스에서 43세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 할이파스 스트 존 테 바프티스트'스 c후르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Hughes nasceu em 1500, em Much Wenlock, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Hugh ap Evan Lloyd, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Mary Ap Gruffydd, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Fletcher em 26 de outubro de 1521, em St John the Baptist's Church, Halifax, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em abril de 1543, em Halifax, West Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 43 anos, e foi sepultado em St John the Baptist's Church, Halifax, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Saint John the Baptist Church, Halifax,: ст джон т баптист'с чурч, хэлифакс, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Hughes родился в 1500 г. в местности муч венлокк, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Hugh ap Evan Lloyd было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Ap Gruffydd, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Fletcher 26 октября 1521 г. в местности ст джон т баптист'с чурч, хэлифакс, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер апрель 1543 г. в местности хэлифакс, вест еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 43 лет и был похоронен в местности ст джон т баптист'с чурч, хэлифакс, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.
